mapper.select: SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, NVL(US.SHELTER_NAME, U.USER_NAME) AS SHELTER_NAME, A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A LEFT JOIN DDD_USER U ON A.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_USER_SHELTER US ON A.USER_NUMBER = US.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DOG_NUMBER, MIN(ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) AS MIN_IMG_NUMBER FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG GROUP BY DOG_NUMBER ) FIRST_IMG ON A.DOG_NUMBER = FIRST_IMG.DOG_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON FIRST_IMG.MIN_IMG_NUMBER = AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER ORDER BY A.DOG_NUMBER DESC

SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.USER_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, A.DOG_GENDER, A.DOG_AGE, A.DOG_WEIGHT, A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, S.DOG_ACTIVITY, S.DOG_SOCIALITY, S.DOG_INDEPENDENCE, S.DOG_BARKING, S.DOG_GROOMING, S.DOG_ACTIVITY_DETAIL, S.DOG_SOCIALITY_DETAIL, S.DOG_INDEPENDENCE_DETAIL, S.DOG_BARKING_DETAIL, S.DOG_GROOMING_DETAIL, A.DOG_DETAIL, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_SCORE S ON A.DOG_NUMBER = S.DOG_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DOG_NUMBER, ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM ( SELECT DOG_NUMBER, ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DOG_NUMBER ORDER BY ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER ASC) as RN FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG ) WHERE RN = 1 ) AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER WHERE A.DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE DDD_ARCHIVE SET DOG_NAME = #{dogName}, DOG_BREED = #{dogBreed}, DOG_GENDER = #{dogGender}, DOG_AGE = #{dogAge}, DOG_WEIGHT = #{dogWeight}, DOG_SAFE_DATE = TO_DATE(REPLACE(SUBSTR(#{dogSafeDate}, 1, 10), 'T', ''), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DOG_DETAIL = #{dogDetail}, ARCHIVE_MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber}

UPDATE DDD_ARCHIVE_SCORE SET DOG_ACTIVITY = #{dogActivity}, DOG_SOCIALITY = #{dogSociality}, DOG_INDEPENDENCE = #{dogIndependence}, DOG_BARKING = #{dogBarking}, DOG_GROOMING = #{dogGrooming}, DOG_ACTIVITY_DETAIL = #{dogActivityDetail}, DOG_SOCIALITY_DETAIL = #{dogSocialityDetail}, DOG_INDEPENDENCE_DETAIL = #{dogIndependenceDetail}, DOG_BARKING_DETAIL = #{dogBarkingDetail}, DOG_GROOMING_DETAIL = #{dogGroomingDetail} WHERE DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber}

MERGE INTO DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI USING DUAL ON (AI.DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ARCHIVE_IMG_NAME = #{archiveImgName}, ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH = #{archiveImgPath} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER, DOG_NUMBER, ARCHIVE_IMG_NAME, ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH) VALUES (SEQ_ARCHIVE_IMG.NEXTVAL, #{dogNumber}, #{archiveImgName}, #{archiveImgPath})
